entity: BBR source abbreviation NOH (New Orleans Hornets 2002-13) maps to warehouse canonical NOP (New Orleans Pelicans 2013+); same franchise, rebranded 2013 (team_id 1610612740)

query_target.sql: SELECT (SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) FROM dim_team WHERE team_id = '1610612740' AND city = 'New Orleans' AND abbreviation = 'NOH') AS noh_row_count, (SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) FROM dim_team WHERE team_id = '1610612740' AND city = 'New Orleans' AND abbreviation = 'NOP') AS nop_row_count

notes: dim_team has two NOH rows (one founded 2002, one re-founded 2007 after the temporary Oklahoma City Hornets stint 2005-07 from Hurricane Katrina) and one NOP row (founded 2013). All share team_id 1610612740. CAST(... AS INTEGER) keeps counts as JSON numbers. NOTE: the task spec asked for `query_fn: getTeamIdentity` but no such function exists — using raw_sql per the existing team_identity fixture pattern.
